sentences.text_translation_en: I live in a small city.

sentences.text_translation_uz: Men do'stim Umar bilan bog'ga boraman.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Я иду в парк с моим другом Омаром.
sentences.text_translation_en: I go to the park with my friend Omar.
sentences.ar_m: أَذْهَبُ إِلَى الْحَدِيقَةِ مَعَ صَدِيقِي عُمَرَ.
sentences.translit_m: Adhhabu ilā l-ḥadīqati maʿa ṣadīqī ʿUmara.
sentences.ar_f: أَذْهَبُ إِلَى الْحَدِيقَةِ مَعَ صَدِيقَتِي عَائِشَةَ.
sentences.translit_f: Adhhabu ilā l-ḥadīqati maʿa ṣadīqatī ʿĀʾishata.
sentences.text_translation_uz_f: Men do'stim Aysha bilan bog'ga boraman.
sentences.text_translation_ru_f: Я иду в парк с моей подругой Аишей.
sentences.text_translation_en_f: I go to the park with my friend Aisha.

sentences.text_translation_uz: Bog'da ko'plab daraxtlar va gullar bor.
sentences.text_translation_ru: В парке много деревьев и цветов.
sentences.text_translation_en: In the park there are many trees and flowers.

sentences.text_translation_uz: Umar suv ichadi, men esa olma yeyman.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Омар пьёт воду, а я ем яблоко.
sentences.text_translation_en: Omar drinks water, and I eat an apple.
sentences.ar_m: عُمَرُ يَشْرَبُ الْمَاءَ، وَأَنَا آكُلُ تُفَّاحَةً.
sentences.translit_m: ʿUmaru yashrabu l-māʾa, wa-anā ākulu tuffāḥatan.
sentences.ar_f: عَائِشَةُ تَشْرَبُ الْمَاءَ، وَأَنَا آكُلُ تُفَّاحَةً.
sentences.translit_f: ʿĀʾishatu tashrabu l-māʾa, wa-anā ākulu tuffāḥatan.
sentences.text_translation_uz_f: Aysha suv ichadi, men esa olma yeyman.
sentences.text_translation_ru_f: Аиша пьёт воду, а я ем яблоко.
sentences.text_translation_en_f: Aisha drinks water, and I eat an apple.

sentences.text_translation_uz: Biz to'p bilan o'ynayotgan bolalarni ko'ramiz.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Мы видим детей, играющих с мячом.
sentences.text_translation_en: We see children playing with the ball.

sentences.text_translation_uz: Bir soatdan keyin biz uyga qaytamiz.
sentences.text_translation_en: After an hour we return home.

sentences.text_translation_uz: Men xursandman, va kun chiroyli o'tdi.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Я счастлив, и день был прекрасным.
sentences.text_translation_en: I am happy, and the day was beautiful.
sentences.text_translation_ru_f: Я счастлива, и день был прекрасным.
